meta.northStar: Eliminate assessment admin burden for coaches. First paying customer is the only metric.

epics.title: Stripe end-to-end payment flow
epics.description: Full subscription billing — coaches can pay, plans are enforced, failures are handled

tasks.title: Set up Stripe account under one-assess.com business identity
Create pricing tables in Stripe dashboard (solo £49/mo, studio £129/mo)
Add live Stripe secret key to Firebase Functions environment
Add live Stripe publishable key to frontend .env
Register Stripe webhook endpoint in Stripe dashboard
Add Stripe webhook secret to Firebase Functions environment
Test checkout session end-to-end with test card
Test subscription creation webhook fires and updates Firestore
Test failed payment handling (card declined flow)
Test subscription cancellation flow
Verify FeatureGate component enforces plan limits correctly
Deploy updated functions and smoke test in production

decisions.decision: APEX OS restructured as project-agnostic system. Project context now loaded from this file and project CLAUDE.md.
Pricing finalised: Free / £39 Solo / £149 Gym. Custom branding £79 one-time add-on.
SendGrid replaced with Resend. Domain verified. Transactional email live.
Firebase admin migrated to michael@one-assess.com. 48 Cloud Functions deployed.

guardian.instructions: When a commit lands, scan the commit message for task IDs matching the pattern below. If found and the message contains a completion keyword, set that task status to done and record the commit SHA in a commitRef field on the task. Then recalculate meta.launchReadiness as (done tasks / total tasks) * 100 rounded to nearest 5. Update meta.lastUpdated to today and meta.updatedBy to guardian.
